name: repomind
description: Semantic codebase search and Q&A for Claude Code. Index once, ask anything — no more pasting files into chat.

tools.name: repomind_ask
tools.description: Ask a natural language question about the indexed repository. Returns the most relevant files and code snippets. When an API key is configured, also returns an AI-generated grounded answer.
tools.when_to_use: User asks how something works, where something is, or what calls/uses a specific component.

tools.name: repomind_explain
tools.description: Explain a specific source file: purpose, public symbols, and execution flow.
tools.when_to_use: User asks about a file, or you need full file context before editing or reviewing it.

tools.name: repomind_overview
tools.description: High-level repository overview: key modules with descriptions, important entry-point files, project summary.
tools.when_to_use: User asks about project structure, or you are starting work on an unfamiliar repo.

tools.name: repomind_index
tools.description: Build or incrementally update the semantic FAISS index for a repository.
tools.when_to_use: Repo has not been indexed yet, or files have changed since the last index.

tools.name: repomind_doctor
tools.description: Diagnose RepoMind setup: index presence, embeddings availability, API key configuration.
tools.when_to_use: Something is not working, or you need to confirm the repo is ready to query.

slash_commands.description: Purpose, functions, and flow of any file
Full project map with module descriptions
